message:
Style Starlight tabs per design system and fix sidebar

- Add comprehensive tab styling following Tenzir Tab Bar spec:
  - 48px height with 2px bottom border indicator
  - Hover background on text container with 5px radius
  - Blue primary color for active state
  - Light/dark mode support
- Remove conflicting sidebar active state overrides that caused
  incorrect background color on selected items

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
